mapper.sql: id, subject_id, question_count, rule_json, create_time, modify_time, deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_smart_training_config WHERE deleted='f' AND subject_id = #{subjectId} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM t_smart_training_config WHERE deleted='f' ORDER BY subject_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_smart_training_config (id, subject_id, question_count, rule_json, create_time, modify_time, deleted) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{subjectId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{questionCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{ruleJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT})

INSERT INTO t_smart_training_config
id, subject_id, question_count, rule_json, create_time, modify_time, deleted,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{subjectId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{questionCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{ruleJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT},
mapper.update: UPDATE t_smart_training_config SET subject_id = #{subjectId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, question_count = #{questionCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, rule_json = #{ruleJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, deleted = #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT} WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
